- 所有元素的异或为 `4 ^ 4 ^ 4 = 4`。

def solve(nums, queries)
    MOD = 10**9 + 7
    n = nums.length
    product = Array.new(n, 1)
    queries.each do |li, ri, ki, vi|
        current = li
        while current <= ri
            product[current] = (product[current] * vi) % MOD
            current += ki
        end
    end
    xor = 0
    nums.each_with_index do |num, i|
        xor ^= (num * product[i]) % MOD
    end
    xor
end
